text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ahh! The first sun of this new era<n>shines bright.
The world has been<n>blessed with the birth of a
champion.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
And at long last, I now outshine that<n>sun. Yes! I am
the Royal Sun!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Woooooooo!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: T.M. Opera O claims a perfect victory!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The curtain has fallen on the<n>generational battle for
supremacy that<n>has raged since late last year!
Welcome to a new era!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Well, Trainer? What have you to say<n>in the
presence of the Centurial<n>Overlord?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
How do I come across in the eyes of<n>the one who
birthed the new ruler?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Is that so? Well, you must not forget<n>your
presence glows in the eyes of<n>others too.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
We, you see, are twin suns—the<n>strongest in all
history.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Now, will you lead me to my throne,<n>Trainer?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You are the only one left who can<n>take my hand
and not be rendered<n>powerless by my majesty.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I reverently take her hand and guide<n>her to the
winner's circle.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Dear fans, the road has been long<n>and arduous!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I declare here and now that, with this<n>victory, I
have become the Centurial<n>Overlord!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The end of the century is upon us!<n>My enemies
are powerless before<n>me. Powerless!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now, ladies and gentlemen, what is it<n>that makes a
king?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Many thoughts surely come to mind.<n>However,
only one condition is<n>absolute.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: And that is to never betray thefaithful.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Heretofore, my running bespoke the<n>Overlord, as
so did my record.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
And henceforth, as the Centurial<n>Overlord, I vow to
maintain a certain<n>and flawless winning streak!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
All I ask in return is your faith and<n>homage. I shall
see to it your loyalty<n>is repaid.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The lead I displayed today... can<n>never be outdone!
It proves I have<n>surpassed the greatest
generation.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Next year, the curtain will rise on a<n>new season, in
which I shall reign<n>supreme!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Woooooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Everyone here feels something more<n>than the
difference in skill on<n>display—what they feel is
absolute<n>strength.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O has shown the power to<n>wrench the
older generation from<n>their position at the top.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Grrrr... She completely did us in.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
You okay with this, Grass? Where do<n>we go from
here?!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I know... As a parting gift, this was far<n>too painful.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I've spoken with Spe... Perhaps we<n>should run in
the Twinkle Series for<n>the time being.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
A bird cannot take flight when filled<n>with regret.
We should forge a fresh<n>stride, one which even
the Centurial<n>Overlord can't defeat.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now, it is time to conduct the founding<n>ceremony
for the new nation under<n>my name.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: First, to introduce the members of the<n>royal house.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The king is I! The queen is I! The<n>prince is I! The
princess... I!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
And the princess's dearest pooch? I!<n>So
comprises the core of this royal<n>family.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Next, the Centurial Overlord's closest<n>and finest
allies. The newly promoted<n>Captain of Knights...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Is you, Meisho Doto!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Eeeek! M-m-me?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The one and only. You have proven<n>your skills and
fortitude. Henceforth,<n>we shall run as partners.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Yes, Opera O!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
And taking up residence beside the<n>castle, as to
visit on occasion, is the<n>daughter of House
Ayabe...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Admire Vega!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I'd... rather not. I mean, sounds like a<n>meaningless
role anyway.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Meaningless? Hardly! The royal<n>family would not
exist without House<n>Ayabe.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Let us maintain the strong bonds<n>we've forged,
as neighbors!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Really?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
And now, the one most responsible<n>for the
dawning of my new era...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: The one who led me to the throne...<n>my trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Yeaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: I step onto the stage after Opera O's<n>introduction.

Without our bond, Trainer, I would<n>have never
reached this glorious<n>height.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Yes, our joint effort—it's what I<n>aspired to create
from the very<n>beginning.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
If I, an Umamusume, and you, a<n>human, can come
together and seize<n>victory...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
A beacon of harmony must emerge<n>between our
races! Bonds which<n>cross borders are the
strongest of all!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ladies and gentlemen! People of any<n>and all races
shall forever be equals<n>in my kingdom... excluding
me of<n>course!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Join hands, work together, and<n>prosper beneath
the Centurial<n>Overlord!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: One Earth, one family!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
We race together! This has always<n>been my true
goal as the Centurial<n>Overlord!
Wooooooooo!

T.M. Opera O is victorious, and now<n>her hidden
ambition has come to light.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Waves of emotion course throughout<n>the
Nakayama Racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: She doesn't fool me...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
No way it was her goal from the<n>beginning. She
came up with that spiel<n>on the spot.
